docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY MEHAN, CONOR AS TO DEFENDANT FIORE, VANESSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
